name: Meetings Manager
description: AI-powered meeting manager — schedule, prep, record, transcribe, and summarize meetings with intelligent context from PAPR memory.

app.name: Meetings Manager
app.description: AI-powered meeting manager — schedule, prep, record, transcribe, and summarize meetings with intelligent context from memory.

jobs.name: Meeting Summarizer
jobs.command:
Summarize all pending meeting transcripts and generate smart tags.

Step 1: Read all pending meetings:
sqlite3 $JOB_DIR/data/data.db "SELECT id, title, transcript, notes FROM meetings WHERE status='pending' AND transcript != ''"

Step 2: For each meeting, generate TWO things:

A) A unified summary document. If the user wrote notes during the meeting, weave them INTO the summary — they represent what the user found most important. Do NOT create a separate "Your Notes" section.

Structure:
## Overview
Brief 2-3 sentence summary.

## Key Decisions
- Bullet points

## Action Items
- [ ] Each as a checkbox

## Follow-ups
- What needs attention next

B) A JSON array of 2-5 short topic tags that describe this meeting. Examples: ["Product", "Engineering"], ["Sales", "Demo", "Q2"], ["1:1", "Performance"], ["Design", "Review"]. Be specific and useful — infer from content, not just keywords. Output as valid JSON array on a single line.

Step 3: Write summary AND tags back:
sqlite3 $JOB_DIR/data/data.db "UPDATE meetings SET summary='SUMMARY_TEXT', tags='TAGS_JSON', status='summarized', updated_at=strftime('%s','now') WHERE id='MEETING_ID'"

Where TAGS_JSON is the JSON array string e.g. '["Product","Engineering"]'

IMPORTANT: Escape single quotes by doubling them in SQL. Write tags as a JSON array string.

author: amirkabbara
